task: Use reverse-engineer to analyze and recreate the object in Image 3: a tall woven pack basket with rounded rectangular rim, leather shoulder straps and belt/vertical straps, side pockets/loops, paper rolls, and a small axe/hatchet strapped to the front.
subjective_quality_notes: Strong reverse-engineer claim discipline preserved end-to-end; no class-knowledge claim quietly promoted to fact in the BOM. Image was not rendered; intake mode disclosed at top.
ab_comparison_notes_for_manager: Compare to partner on: (1) preservation of inferred-vs-observed labels, (2) explicit intake-mode disclosure, (3) presence of a substitution table for material sourcing, (4) tiered measurement requests vs flat list, (5) safety treatment for the front-mounted hatchet.
